name: file-manager
description: 全栈文件管理系统 - Vue3 + Node.js

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.package: npm run build && tar -czf file-manager.tar.gz --exclude='backend/node_modules' backend/
scripts.install:all: npm install --registry https://registry.npmmirror.com/ && cd frontend && npm install --registry https://registry.npmmirror.com/ && cd ../backend && npm install --registry https://registry.npmmirror.com/
